programs.name: Adapted CampTO Explore
programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: Volleyball: Recreational
programs.description: Develop skills through play with recreational volleyball. Players of all levels can register to join the fun and participate in structured scrimmages or small-sided games where staff will ensure rules are followed and participation is balanced. There is no formal instruction.

programs.name: Pilates
programs.description: Build core strength and improve flexibility with this head-to-toe workout. As you progress through slow-paced movements, performed in sequence, you will learn to incorporate an awareness of the spine and breath in this complete approach to well being.

programs.name: HIIT: Boot Camp
programs.description: Challenge yourself with this high-intensity interval training (HIIT) workout that offers both cardio and strength-developing components. Alternate between high- and low-intensity exercises to boost endurance and physical fitness.

programs.name: Gentle Fit
programs.description: Seeking a class with a more relaxed pace to improve your fitness? Using gentle movements and low-intensity level exercises, workouts will include both cardio and muscle conditioning options.

programs.name: After-School Program
programs.description: Are you seeking organized activities at the end of the school day? The After School Program offers just that. Keep engaged with peers through various indoor and outdoor recreation activities including games, crafts and sports.

programs.name: Sewing
programs.description: Come get an introduction to this handy skill. Learn how to read a pattern, cut material, stich by hand or use a sewing machine with the aim of completing a simple project.

programs.name: Yoga
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga. Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength.

programs.name: Yoga
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga.  Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength.

programs.name: Gentle Fit
programs.description: Seeking a class with a more relaxed pace to improve your fitness? Using gentle movements and low-intensity level exercises, workouts will include both  cardio and muscle conditioning options.

programs.name: Yoga
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga. Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength.

programs.name: Functional Mobility: TIME
programs.description: In partnership with University Health Network, Toronto Rehabilitation Institute, a modified exercise program suitable for adults with mobility challenges, who can walk at least 10 metres and may use a cane or walker. Exercises are designed to increase strength, balance, mobility and overall health. Participant screening is required prior to registration, please contact Pauline Phillips at 416 395 0267 before registering for this program.You may bring a support person with you. FitnessTO memberships do not apply.Participants Must Be Able To:1. Walk 10 meters (2 lane residential street) without the help of another person. -Can use other kind of aide. -Speed and quality is not important 2. Follow instructions and demonstrations in small group setting.3. Safely stand and move with hand support for balance. 4. Rise from a chair on their own. For more information, registration assistance, or access to subsidy support, please contact 437-331-6325.www.uhn.ca/TorontoRehab/Clinics/TIME
programs.time: 4:00 PM - 3:00 PM on the next day

programs.name: Dance: Line Dance
programs.description: Are you ready to step up your dance skills with line dancing? Using basic steps to create repetitive combinations, you'll learn moves like the shuffle, grapevine, coaster step and mambo step through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Gentle Fit
programs.description: Seeking a class with a more relaxed pace to improve your fitness? Using gentle movements and low-intensity level exercises, workouts will include both  cardio and muscle conditioning options.

programs.name: Tai Chi
programs.description: Embrace the body and mind through the practice of tai chi . Learn how to pair gentle movements that you will perform in a sequence with controlled breathing, to improve your flexibility, coordination, strength and mental concentration.

programs.name: Tai Chi
programs.description: Embrace the body and mind through the practice of tai chi . Learn how to pair gentle movements that you will perform in a sequence with controlled breathing, to improve your flexibility, coordination, strength and mental concentration.

programs.name: Tai Chi

programs.name: Cardio: High/Low
programs.description: Do you love aerobic exercise? With the ability to choose between high and low-impact movements, in this workout, you decide what works best for you to improve your overall fitness.

programs.name: Gentle Fit
programs.description: Seeking a class with a more relaxed pace to improve your fitness? Using gentle movements and low-intensity level exercises, workouts will include both  cardio and muscle conditioning options.

programs.name: Tai Chi
programs.description: Embrace the body and mind through the practice of tai chi. Learn how to pair gentle movements that you will perform in a sequence with controlled breathing, to improve your flexibility, coordination, strength and mental concentration.

programs.name: Yoga with Baby
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga. Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength in this class specifically designed for new caregivers. Here you can relax knowing participation is at your own pace and you can attend to your baby as needed. The recommended age for your baby is 1 to 12 months.

Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. To register contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: Yoga
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga.  Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength.

programs.name: Yoga
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga.  Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength.

programs.name: Cardio: High/Low
programs.description: Do you love aerobic exercise? With the ability to choose between high and low-impact movements, in this workout, you decide what works best for you to improve your overall fitness.

programs.name: Yoga
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga.  Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength.

programs.name: Pilates
programs.description: Build core strength and improve flexibility with this head-to-toe workout. As you progress through slow-paced movements, performed in sequence, you will learn to incorporate an awareness of the spine and breath in this complete approach to well being.

programs.name: Tai Chi
programs.description: Embrace the body and mind through the practice of tai chi . Learn how to pair gentle movements that you will perform in a sequence with controlled breathing, to improve your flexibility, coordination, strength and mental concentration.

programs.name: Yoga/Pilates Fusion
programs.description: Yoga and Pilates movements are combined to create a unique fitness experience. Focusing on body alignment and overall flexibility, you will learn fundamentals from both practices to improve your strength, coordination and relaxation.

programs.name: After-School Program
programs.description: Are you seeking organized activities at the end of the school day? The After School Program offers just that. Keep engaged with peers through various indoor and outdoor recreation activities including games, crafts and sports.

programs.name: Sewing
programs.description: Come get an introduction to this handy skill. Learn how to read a pattern, cut material, stich by hand or use a sewing machine with the aim of completing a simple project.

programs.description: Build core strength and improve flexibility with this head-to-toe workout. As you progress through slow-paced movements, performed in sequence, you will learn to incorporate an awareness of the spine and breath in this complete approach to well being.

programs.name: Yoga
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga.  Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength.

programs.name: Yoga
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga.  Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength.

programs.name: Cardio: High/Low
programs.description: Do you love aerobic exercise? With the ability to choose between high and low-impact movements, in this workout, you decide what works best for you to improve your overall fitness.

programs.name: Yoga
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga.  Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength.

programs.name: Pilates
programs.description: Build core strength and improve flexibility with this head-to-toe workout. As you progress through slow-paced movements, performed in sequence, you will learn to incorporate an awareness of the spine and breath in this complete approach to well being.

programs.name: Tai Chi
programs.description: Embrace the body and mind through the practice of tai chi . Learn how to pair gentle movements that you will perform in a sequence with controlled breathing, to improve your flexibility, coordination, strength and mental concentration.

programs.name: Yoga/Pilates Fusion
programs.description: Yoga and Pilates movements are combined to create a unique fitness experience. Focusing on body alignment and overall flexibility, you will learn fundamentals from both practices to improve your strength, coordination and relaxation.

programs.name: After-School Program
programs.description: Are you seeking organized activities at the end of the school day? The After School Program offers just that. Keep engaged with peers through various indoor and outdoor recreation activities including games, crafts and sports.

programs.name: Sewing
programs.description: Come get an introduction to this handy skill. Learn how to read a pattern, cut material, stich by hand or use a sewing machine with the aim of completing a simple project.

programs.name: Pilates
programs.description: Build core strength and improve flexibility with this head-to-toe workout. As you progress through slow-paced movements, performed in sequence, you will learn to incorporate an awareness of the spine and breath in this complete approach to well being.

programs.name: Volleyball: Recreational
programs.description: Develop skills through play with recreational volleyball. Players of all levels can register to join the fun and participate in structured scrimmages or small-sided games where staff will ensure rules are followed and participation is balanced. There is no formal instruction.

programs.name: Pilates
programs.description: Build core strength and improve flexibility with this head-to-toe workout. As you progress through slow-paced movements, performed in sequence, you will learn to incorporate an awareness of the spine and breath in this complete approach to well being.

programs.name: HIIT: Boot Camp
programs.description: Challenge yourself with this high-intensity interval training (HIIT) workout that offers both cardio and strength-developing components. Alternate between high- and low-intensity exercises to boost endurance and physical fitness.

programs.name: Gentle Fit
programs.description: Seeking a class with a more relaxed pace to improve your fitness? Using gentle movements and low-intensity level exercises, workouts will include both cardio and muscle conditioning options.

programs.name: After-School Program
programs.description: Are you seeking organized activities at the end of the school day? The After School Program offers just that. Keep engaged with peers through various indoor and outdoor recreation activities including games, crafts and sports.

programs.name: Sewing
programs.description: Come get an introduction to this handy skill. Learn how to read a pattern, cut material, stich by hand or use a sewing machine with the aim of completing a simple project.

programs.name: Yoga
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga. Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength.

programs.name: Functional Mobility: TIME
programs.description: In partnership with University Health Network, Toronto Rehabilitation Institute, a modified exercise program suitable for adults with mobility challenges, who can walk at least 10 metres and may use a cane or walker. Exercises are designed to increase strength, balance, mobility and overall health. Participant screening is required prior to registration, please contact Pauline Phillips at 416 395 0267 before registering for this program.You may bring a support person with you. FitnessTO memberships do not apply.Participants Must Be Able To:1. Walk 10 meters (2 lane residential street) without the help of another person. -Can use other kind of aide. -Speed and quality is not important 2. Follow instructions and demonstrations in small group setting.3. Safely stand and move with hand support for balance. 4. Rise from a chair on their own. For more information, registration assistance, or access to subsidy support, please contact 437-331-6325.www.uhn.ca/TorontoRehab/Clinics/TIME
programs.time: 4:00 PM - 3:00 PM on the next day

programs.name: Dance: Line Dance
programs.description: Are you ready to step up your dance skills with line dancing? Using basic steps to create repetitive combinations, you'll learn moves like the shuffle, grapevine, coaster step and mambo step through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Yoga with Baby
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga. Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength in this class specifically designed for new caregivers. Here you can relax knowing participation is at your own pace and you can attend to your baby as needed. The recommended age for your baby is 1 to 12 months.

programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.
